ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($Profile.Name = 'System Administrator'), NOT(ISNEW()), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Approval_Status__c), 'Approved'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Approval_Status__c), 'Auto Approved'),
ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Approval_Status__c), 'Bulk Approved'),
ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Approval_Status__c), 'Rejected') ),
OR( ISCHANGED(Total_Capex__c), ISCHANGED(X8_Year_IRR__c),
ISCHANGED(Anchor_TCF_yr__c), ISCHANGED(Pipeline_Colo_Amount__c), ISCHANGED(Ground_Rent__c)
) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please contact System Administrator to make to changes to UE as the UE is already Approved/Rejected.
